name: gamenetworkingsockets
description: A basic transport layer for games.

openssl.description: Use OpenSSL as the crypto provider.  This is the default.

libsodium.description: Use libsodium as the crypto provider.

ice.description: Compile support for P2P connections and the native ICE client (STUN and TURN).

webrtc.description: Compile the Google WebRTC ICE implementation and use it as the default ICE backend.  Requires 'ice'.
